Paying tax for small businesses in South Africa may seem like a daunting task, but once you are equipped with the knowledge, you will think otherwise. Once your small business exceeds certain tax thresholds, SARS treats your business tax as one and the same as everyone else, there are no exceptions. It is better to know your tax standing beforehand.

Tax Responsibilities of Businesses

All businesses are required by law to pay taxes and maintain a record for cases of tax returns. It is their obligation to register, pay their taxes on time and file accurate tax returns. It helps to have a dedicated accountant who understands the laws surrounding taxes and can handle the responsibility thus having your taxes submitted accurately and on time. 

The responsibilities of a sole proprietorship are different from that of a Partnership or a Private company. The tax for small businesses does vary.

Proprietorships are defined as small-scale and owned by self-employed persons. 

Partnerships have a minimum of two shareholders, each taxed individually. 

Co-operative, public or private companies are required to register with the Company and Intellectual Property Commission (CPIC). While they may have a founder, they are usually comprised of a group of people with common interests and the company is taxed separately. Generally, they contribute the most to tax. 

We’ll look further into some relevant South African tax information for small businesses in this blog.

What are tax returns? 

Having the correct knowledge of tax for small businesses means knowing the ins and outs of tax returns. Above all else, tax returns are prepared documents of income and expenses. They hold your financial information, and dates of scheduled payments and allow you to collect refunds for overpayments of tax. 

If your business doesn’t have a dedicated bookkeeper or accountant to do the job, consider outsourcing to a reliable firm. Their bookkeepers help manage invoices and all financial statements while keeping you compliant. With their accumulated knowledge, outsourced accountants can help you decide whether a refund or rollover suits your financial situation. This is done via eFiling.

Know your taxes 

There are many different types of tax, however, not all apply to business. Taxes such as personal income tax (PIT) is paid by the individual and remains their sole responsibility. Regardless of their role in a partnership or other entity, their business tax needs to be declared on their PIT form. Then there is PAYE which is tax paid on behalf of the company before paying the employee’s salary.

Let’s discuss some more relevant taxes concerning businesses.

Corporate income tax (CIT) 

CIT tax applies to the profits at a flat rate of 28%. The rate of tax for small businesses could potentially be lower if you meet SARS criteria for an SBC. Overall, business expenditures usually lower the rate and companies are allowed a 6-month extension when filing their tax returns, upon accepted requests. CIT is paid every year while small businesses have a leeway of 12 months after the tax year. 

Provisional tax 

Put simply, it is an estimated down payment of yearly taxable income CIT. It is paid twice annually: around the six-month mark and again come year-end. You can get a refund if you are in excess of your paid estimations.

Pay As You Earn (PAYE) tax 

PAYE is tax that is taken from your employee’s salary and paid within seven days of the deduction. This tax is paid every month before the 7th. Along with PAYE, there are a few other tax registrations a company may have to submit. Such an example is the tax for small businesses & corporations.

Dividend tax 

Dividends, or select portions of a company’s profits, are distributed among shareholders. The company withholds a flat rate of 20 percent to be paid as tax.

Small business corporations (SBC) tax 

If the turnover for small corporations doesn’t exceed R20 million, they may qualify to pay tax at a reduced rate. There may be no need to go looking for a reduced rate of tax for small businesses, as this rate may be applied automatically upon meeting registration requirements. 

Excise tax 

The more volatile tax in comparison to the rest. In simple terms, it can be viewed as a user fee. An example would be the long-term negative effects of sugary products which could lead to hospitalisation. The “extra fee” would contribute to government hospitals.

VAT (Value Added Tax)

VAT is a standard tax indirectly applied to goods and services, paid monthly or bi-monthly before the 25th, within an economy. Upon registration, you will know your VAT period. In South Africa, the rate of tax for small businesses is 15% as of 2023. 

Turnover tax (TOT) 

TOT simplifies the burden of tax for small businesses with a turnover of under R33,500. It reduces administration and makes compliance easier. This tax replaces a few of the above-mentioned taxes, and it is best practice to check with a chartered accountant for turnover tax information regarding small businesses.

If a company doesn’t exceed the VAT threshold, when paying TOT, they have the option to register for VAT.

VAT registration

When it comes to Value Added Tax (VAT), there are two main categories: compulsory and voluntary. With laws regarding electronic invoices and submitting tax for small businesses online, it is wise to consult accountants who have access to the latest accounting software and understand the implications within the process. 

If turnover exceeds or expects to exceed the local threshold of R1 million within twelve months, you are eligible to register.

However, when your business’s turnover exceeds or expects to exceed R50k in a twelve-month period, then you have a choice to register for VAT within 21 days of exceeding the threshold. 

For more info on how to register for VAT, visit the SARS page on VAT registration.

Tax exemptions and deductions

Taxes for small business corporations (SBC) and micro businesses differ. The turnover threshold amount on income tax for small businesses is R70 700, which means you won’t pay tax on profits below this amount. Small businesses are exempt from tax if they are below certain thresholds. 

Deductions in South Africa can be any number of small business expenses, such as educational or training expenses and maintenance expenses all the way from costs on email domains to office repairs and asset depreciation. There are a whole host of expenses that a qualified accountant can help you identify.

Lastly, you may be asking yourself; “When and how do I pay taxes?”. With the laws being updated, they make it possible to pay your tax online with SARS eFiling. Visit the SARS website for more information although an outsourced accountant can handle this responsibility. Most taxes are paid annually. If you have a certified chartered accountant on your payroll, they will know the deadlines and ensure your taxes are paid on time.

af.title: Belasting vir klein ondernemings in Suid-Afrika ontrafel
af.desc: Alle ondernemings moet volgens wet belasting betaal en rekords vir belastingopgawes hou. Leer meer oor belasting vir klein ondernemings.
af.html:
Om belasting vir klein ondernemings in Suid-Afrika te betaal mag dalk soos 'n ontmoedigende taak lyk, maar sodra jy met die nodige kennis toegerus is, sal jy anders dink. Sodra jou klein onderneming sekere belastingdrempels oorskry, behandel SARS jou besigheidsbelasting presies dieselfde as almal s'n, sonder uitsonderings. Dit is beter om jou belastingposisie vooraf te ken.

Belastingverantwoordelikhede van ondernemings

Alle ondernemings moet volgens wet belasting betaal en rekords hou vir gevalle van belastingopgawes. Dit is hul verpligting om te registreer, hul belasting betyds te betaal en akkurate belastingopgawes in te dien. Dit help om 'n toegewyde rekenmeester te hê wat die wette rondom belasting verstaan en die verantwoordelikheid kan hanteer sodat jou belasting akkuraat en betyds ingedien word.

Die verantwoordelikhede van 'n eenmansaak verskil van dié van 'n vennootskap of 'n private maatskappy. Die belasting vir klein ondernemings verskil wel.

Eenmansake word gedefinieer as kleinskaals en word besit deur selfindiensgeneemde persone.

Vennootskappe het 'n minimum van twee aandeelhouers, wat elk individueel belas word.

Koöperasies, openbare of private maatskappye moet by die Maatskappy- en Intellektuele Eiendomskommissie (CIPC) registreer. Hoewel hulle 'n stigter mag hê, bestaan hulle gewoonlik uit 'n groep mense met gemeenskaplike belange en die maatskappy word afsonderlik belas. Oor die algemeen dra hulle die meeste tot belasting by.

Ons sal in hierdie blog verder kyk na 'n paar relevante Suid-Afrikaanse belastingbesonderhede vir klein ondernemings.

Wat is belastingopgawes?

Om die korrekte kennis van belasting vir klein ondernemings te hê, beteken om die binne en buite van belastingopgawes te ken. Bowenal is belastingopgawes opgestelde dokumente van inkomste en uitgawes. Hulle bevat jou finansiële inligting en datums van geskeduleerde betalings en stel jou in staat om terugbetalings vir oorbetalings van belasting in te vorder.

As jou onderneming nie 'n toegewyde boekhouer of rekenmeester het om die werk te doen nie, oorweeg dit om dit aan 'n betroubare firma uit te kontrakteer. Hul boekhouers help om fakture en alle finansiële state te bestuur terwyl hulle jou voldoenend hou. Met hul opgegaarde kennis kan uitgekontrakteerde rekenmeesters jou help besluit of 'n terugbetaling of oordrag jou finansiële situasie pas. Dit word via eFiling gedoen.

Ken jou belasting

Daar is baie verskillende soorte belasting, maar nie almal is op besighede van toepassing nie. Belasting soos persoonlike inkomstebelasting (PIT) word deur die individu betaal en bly hul alleenverantwoordelikheid. Ongeag hul rol in 'n vennootskap of ander entiteit, moet hul besigheidsbelasting op hul PIT-vorm verklaar word. Dan is daar PAYE, wat belasting is wat namens die maatskappy betaal word voordat die werknemer se salaris uitbetaal word.

Kom ons bespreek 'n paar meer relevante belastings wat met besighede verband hou.

Korporatiewe inkomstebelasting (CIT)

CIT-belasting is van toepassing op die winste teen 'n vaste koers van 28%. Die belastingkoers vir klein ondernemings kan moontlik laer wees as jy aan SARS se kriteria vir 'n SBC voldoen. Oor die algemeen verlaag besigheidsuitgawes gewoonlik die koers en maatskappye word 'n verlenging van 6 maande toegestaan wanneer hulle hul belastingopgawes indien, na goedgekeurde versoeke. CIT word jaarliks betaal terwyl klein ondernemings 'n speelruimte van 12 maande na die belastingjaar het.

Voorlopige belasting

Eenvoudig gestel, is dit 'n geskatte vooruitbetaling van jaarlikse belasbare inkomste CIT. Dit word twee keer per jaar betaal: rondom die sesmaandmerk en weer teen jaareinde. Jy kan 'n terugbetaling kry as jy meer as jou betaalde skattings betaal het.

Betaal Soos Jy Verdien (PAYE) belasting

PAYE is belasting wat van jou werknemer se salaris afgetrek word en binne sewe dae na die aftrekking betaal word. Hierdie belasting word elke maand voor die 7de betaal. Saam met PAYE is daar 'n paar ander belastingregistrasies wat 'n maatskappy dalk moet indien. So 'n voorbeeld is die belasting vir klein ondernemings en korporasies.

Dividendbelasting

Dividende, of geselekteerde gedeeltes van 'n maatskappy se winste, word onder aandeelhouers versprei. Die maatskappy hou 'n vaste koers van 20 persent terug om as belasting betaal te word.

Belasting op klein besigheidskorporasies (SBC)

As die omset vir klein korporasies nie R20 miljoen oorskry nie, kan hulle kwalifiseer om belasting teen 'n verlaagde koers te betaal. Daar is dalk geen nodigheid om na 'n verlaagde belastingkoers vir klein ondernemings te soek nie, aangesien hierdie koers outomaties toegepas kan word sodra aan registrasievereistes voldoen is. 

Aksynsbelasting

Die meer wisselvallige belasting in vergelyking met die res. Eenvoudig gestel, kan dit as 'n gebruikersfooi beskou word. 'n Voorbeeld sou die langtermyn negatiewe gevolge van suikerprodukte wees wat tot hospitalisasie kan lei. Die “ekstra fooi” sou tot staatshospitale bydra.

BTW (Belasting op Toegevoegde Waarde)

BTW is 'n standaardbelasting wat indirek op goedere en dienste toegepas word, maandeliks of tweemaandeliks voor die 25ste betaal, binne 'n ekonomie. By registrasie sal jy jou BTW-tydperk ken. In Suid-Afrika is die belastingkoers vir klein ondernemings 15% vanaf 2023.

Omsetbelasting (TOT)

TOT vereenvoudig die las van belasting vir klein ondernemings met 'n omset van onder R33 500. Dit verminder administrasie en maak voldoening makliker. Hierdie belasting vervang 'n paar van die bogenoemde belastings, en dit is beste praktyk om met 'n geoktrooieerde rekenmeester te kontroleer vir omsetbelastinginligting rakende klein ondernemings.

As 'n maatskappy nie die BTW-drempel oorskry nie, het hulle, wanneer hulle TOT betaal, die opsie om vir BTW te registreer.

BTW-registrasie

Wanneer dit by Belasting op Toegevoegde Waarde (BTW) kom, is daar twee hoofkategorieë: verpligtend en vrywillig. Met wette rakende elektroniese fakture en die aanlyn indiening van belasting vir klein ondernemings, is dit verstandig om rekenmeesters te raadpleeg wat toegang tot die nuutste rekeningkundige sagteware het en die implikasies binne die proses verstaan.

As omset die plaaslike drempel van R1 miljoen binne twaalf maande oorskry of verwag word om dit te oorskry, kom jy in aanmerking om te registreer.

Wanneer jou onderneming se omset egter R50k in 'n tydperk van twaalf maande oorskry of verwag word om dit te oorskry, het jy 'n keuse om binne 21 dae nadat die drempel oorskry is vir BTW te registreer.

Vir meer inligting oor hoe om vir BTW te registreer, besoek die SARS-bladsy oor BTW-registrasie.

Belastingvrystellings en aftrekkings

Belasting vir klein besigheidskorporasies (SBC) en mikro-ondernemings verskil. Die omsetdrempelbedrag op inkomstebelasting vir klein ondernemings is R70 700, wat beteken jy sal nie belasting op winste onder hierdie bedrag betaal nie. Klein ondernemings is vrygestel van belasting as hulle onder sekere drempels is.

Aftrekkings in Suid-Afrika kan enige aantal klein besigheidsuitgawes wees, soos onderrig- of opleidingsuitgawes en onderhoudsuitgawes, alles van koste op e-posdomeine tot kantoorherstelwerk en bate-waardevermindering. Daar is 'n hele reeks uitgawes wat 'n gekwalifiseerde rekenmeester jou kan help identifiseer.

Laastens vra jy dalk vir jouself: “Wanneer en hoe betaal ek belasting?”. Met die wette wat opgedateer word, maak hulle dit moontlik om jou belasting aanlyn met SARS eFiling te betaal. Besoek die SARS-webwerf vir meer inligting, hoewel 'n uitgekontrakteerde rekenmeester hierdie verantwoordelikheid kan hanteer. Die meeste belasting word jaarliks betaal. As jy 'n gesertifiseerde geoktrooieerde rekenmeester op jou betaalstaat het, sal hulle die sperdatums ken en verseker dat jou belasting betyds betaal word.

posts.title: How can a chartered accountant add value to your business?
posts.excerpt: Sometimes referred to as certified public accountants, chartered accountants are specialised accountants with an international accounting designation. They can perform everyday tasks, and have a wide knowledge of accounting principles. Offering unique perspectives and skills in analysis, chartered accountants are able to solve the toughest taxation problems which can save you money. Most importantly they ... Read more
posts.desc: Chartered accountants are specialised accountants with an international accounting designation & have a wide knowledge of accounting principles.
posts.html:
Sometimes referred to as certified public accountants, chartered accountants are specialised accountants with an international accounting designation. They can perform everyday tasks, and have a wide knowledge of accounting principles.

Offering unique perspectives and skills in analysis, chartered accountants are able to solve the toughest taxation problems which can save you money. Most importantly they always improve or maintain your level of compliance thus mitigating risks and saving you time.

Who are chartered accountants?

Unlike your everyday accountants, chartered accountants have to undergo a four-part standardised exam, and undergo continual training. This means they meet the required industry standards and are thus able to act as a tax representative for your business in a courtroom. 

They have a degree, as does any accountant, but have a higher level of taxation expertise. Regular accountants specialise in certain aspects of accounting, while chartered accountants have a broader knowledge base and years of experience under a senior chartered accountant. 

What do chartered accountants do?

With their continual training, they are enabled to file tax returns and perform an audit on a business’s financial statements. Assurance and auditing are some of the basic capabilities among chartered accountants. They have a broad spectrum of accounting knowledge. 

Their education allows them to monitor funds and provide technical assistance whenever necessary. They have experience with practical applications of managing accounts and being consultants to financial data. Alongside all that, they are versed in taxation and tax payments and are legally allowed to approve tax deductions. 

How do chartered accountants add value?

There would be a stark difference in the value created by a chartered accountant compared with a regular accountant. 

That’s not to say one shouldn’t hire an everyday accountant, but if your needs are more complex and you’re looking to increase your value then hiring a chartered accountant is the way to go. Here are some of the few ways that chartered accountants add value to a firm.

Taxes expertise

When it comes to filing your tax returns, they will have insight on whether to add to the cash flow or roll over to the following tax year. Tactical choices as such is a speciality of chartered accountants. 

Estimates of tax deductions from accurate bookkeeping allow them to plan long-term. With more precise estimates, your company can keep a good cash flow even in times of financial dips. With funds on hand year-round, you’re able to improve upon assets and keep all liabilities low and debt out of the picture.

Keep you compliant

Outsourcing your accounting to a chartered accountant does minimise the risk involved. They know the ins and outs of governing laws regarding business compliance. Often they would start implementing strategic plans from the get-go. This would steer your finances in the right direction, and your existing stresses will fade. 

If you’re able to stay compliant then you will likely experience sustainable growth. While your business grows you will have to upgrade certain departments and increase expenditures. All this will require a careful accountant with comprehensive knowledge of the laws for your current business standing. Different regulations apply to each sector, whether it be a small enterprise or an established corporation. Having a dedicated accountant massively improves your rate of growth when transitioning to a higher financial bracket.

Evaluating & advise financial plans

If you have solid accounting plans in place there will be less work for your chartered accountant. In other cases, they will optimize existing operations, and set clear processes to achieve your financial goals. Collaborating with them and setting down the blueprints is a crucial part of their work. 

If you’re heading towards financial ruin, they can intervene and set up your plans to a workable goal, to your satisfaction. With outsourced chartered accountant advisers having additional experience and colleagues to consult, you can trust their evaluation. You can consult on prospective investments and critically evaluate investing in relations and certain resources, thus discovering opportunities that weren’t previously visible.  

Unique accounting perspectives

Chartered accountants have a wider and deeper knowledge of accounting principles, and can handle more complex issues than regular accountants. This adds to the overall productivity and maintains that financial edge among other businesses. Their knowledge and creativity present themselves in the form of ingenious solutions and add to their competitiveness.  Predicting the consequences gives you more with which to work. 

If your business needs to take on a loan, your accountant can select a bank with good interest rates. They can also back up your financial statements, increasing the likelihood of attaining the loans and can provide you with a financial overview before making decisions in a timely manner.

Takeaways

Chartered accountants bring specialised accounting skills to the table to help your business grow. Having an intentional mind about solving your financial problems, chartered accountants can lower your tax expenses and bring about more investing options.

They bring about peace of mind and free up time when handling financial plans and always keep you in compliance with the latest regulations.

af.title: Hoe kan ’n geoktrooieerde rekenmeester waarde tot jou besigheid toevoeg?
af.desc: Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters is gespesialiseerde rekenmeesters met ’n internasionale rekeningkundige titel & het wye kennis van rekeningkundige beginsels.
af.html:
Soms na verwys as gesertifiseerde openbare rekenmeesters, is geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters gespesialiseerde rekenmeesters met ’n internasionale rekeningkundige titel. Hulle kan alledaagse take verrig, en het ’n wye kennis van rekeningkundige beginsels.

Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters bied unieke perspektiewe en vaardighede in analise, en is in staat om die moeilikste belastingprobleme op te los wat jou geld kan bespaar. Mees belangrik verbeter of handhaaf hulle altyd jou vlak van voldoening en verminder sodoende risiko’s en bespaar jou tyd.

Wie is geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters?

Anders as jou alledaagse rekenmeesters, moet geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters ’n vierdelige gestandaardiseerde eksamen aflê, en deurlopende opleiding ondergaan. Dit beteken hulle voldoen aan die vereiste bedryfstandaarde en is sodoende in staat om as ’n belastingverteenwoordiger vir jou besigheid in ’n hofsaal op te tree. 

Hulle het ’n graad, soos enige rekenmeester, maar het ’n hoër vlak van belastingkundigheid. Gewone rekenmeesters spesialiseer in sekere aspekte van rekeningkunde, terwyl geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters ’n breër kennisbasis en jare se ervaring onder ’n senior geoktrooieerde rekenmeester het. 

Wat doen geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters?

Met hul deurlopende opleiding word hulle in staat gestel om belastingopgawes in te dien en ’n oudit op ’n besigheid se finansiële state te verrig. Versekering en ouditering is van die basiese vermoëns onder geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters. Hulle het ’n breë spektrum van rekeningkundige kennis. 

Hul opvoeding laat hulle toe om fondse te monitor en tegniese bystand te verleen wanneer ook al nodig. Hulle het ervaring met praktiese toepassings van die bestuur van rekeninge en om konsultante vir finansiële data te wees. Tesame met dit alles is hulle bedrewe in belasting en belastingbetalings en word hulle wetlik toegelaat om belastingaftrekkings goed te keur. 

Hoe voeg geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters waarde toe?

Daar sou ’n skerp verskil wees in die waarde wat deur ’n geoktrooieerde rekenmeester geskep word in vergelyking met ’n gewone rekenmeester. 

Dit is nie om te sê ’n mens behoort nie ’n alledaagse rekenmeester te huur nie, maar as jou behoeftes meer kompleks is en jy wil jou waarde verhoog dan is die huur van ’n geoktrooieerde rekenmeester die regte pad. Hier is ’n paar van die min maniere waarop geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters waarde tot ’n firma toevoeg.

Belastingkundigheid

Wanneer dit kom by die indiening van jou belastingopgawes, sal hulle insig hê oor of jy by die kontantvloei moet voeg of na die volgende belastingjaar oorrol. Taktiese keuses soos hierdie is ’n spesialiteit van geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters. 

Skattings van belastingaftrekkings uit akkurate boekhouding laat hulle toe om langtermyn te beplan. Met meer presiese skattings kan jou maatskappy ’n goeie kontantvloei behou selfs in tye van finansiële insinkings. Met fondse op hande die hele jaar deur kan jy bates verbeter en alle laste laag hou en skuld uit die prentjie hou.

Hou jou voldoenend

Om jou rekeningkunde aan ’n geoktrooieerde rekenmeester uit te kontrakteer verminder wel die risiko betrokke. Hulle ken die fyn besonderhede van regulerende wette rakende besigheidsvoldoening. Dikwels sou hulle van die staanspoor af begin om strategiese planne te implementeer. Dit sou jou finansies in die regte rigting stuur, en jou bestaande stres sal vervaag. 

As jy in staat is om voldoenend te bly dan sal jy waarskynlik volhoubare groei ervaar. Terwyl jou besigheid groei sal jy sekere afdelings moet opgradeer en uitgawes verhoog. Dit alles sal ’n versigtige rekenmeester met omvattende kennis van die wette vir jou huidige besigheidstand vereis. Verskillende regulasies is op elke sektor van toepassing, of dit ’n klein onderneming of ’n gevestigde korporasie is. Om ’n toegewyde rekenmeester te hê verbeter jou groeikoers grootliks wanneer jy na ’n hoër finansiële groep oorgaan.

Evalueer & adviseer finansiële planne

As jy soliede rekeningkundige planne in plek het sal daar minder werk vir jou geoktrooieerde rekenmeester wees. In ander gevalle sal hulle bestaande bedrywighede optimeer, en duidelike prosesse vasstel om jou finansiële doelwitte te bereik. Om met hulle saam te werk en die bloudrukke neer te lê is ’n noodsaaklike deel van hul werk. 

As jy op pad na finansiële ondergang is, kan hulle ingryp en jou planne na ’n werkbare doel opstel, tot jou tevredenheid. Met uitgekontrakteerde geoktrooieerde rekenmeester-adviseurs wat bykomende ervaring en kollegas het om te raadpleeg, kan jy hul evaluering vertrou. Jy kan raadpleeg oor voornemende beleggings en krities die belegging in verhoudings en sekere hulpbronne evalueer, en sodoende geleenthede ontdek wat voorheen nie sigbaar was nie.  

Unieke rekeningkundige perspektiewe

Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters het ’n wyer en dieper kennis van rekeningkundige beginsels, en kan meer komplekse kwessies as gewone rekenmeesters hanteer. Dit dra by tot die algehele produktiwiteit en handhaaf daardie finansiële voorsprong onder ander besighede. Hul kennis en kreatiwiteit toon hulself in die vorm van vindingryke oplossings en dra by tot hul mededingendheid.  Om die gevolge te voorspel gee jou meer waarmee om te werk. 

As jou besigheid ’n lening moet aangaan, kan jou rekenmeester ’n bank met goeie rentekoerse kies. Hulle kan ook jou finansiële state rugsteun, wat die waarskynlikheid verhoog om die lenings te bekom en kan jou betyds van ’n finansiële oorsig voorsien voordat jy besluite neem.

Wegneemboodskappe

Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters bring gespesialiseerde rekeningkundige vaardighede na die tafel om jou besigheid te help groei. Met ’n doelgerigte ingesteldheid om jou finansiële probleme op te los, kan geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters jou belastinguitgawes verlaag en meer beleggingsopsies teweegbring.

Hulle bring gemoedsrus en maak tyd vry wanneer hulle finansiële planne hanteer en hou jou altyd in voldoening met die nuutste regulasies.

posts.title: What is a small business accountant?
posts.excerpt: When your business requires an accountant but cannot hire one full-time, your next best option is to hire an outsourced business accountant for your small business. They are employed by firms with secure data processes, who have your best interests in mind. They work alongside teams of accountants that are adept at providing you with ... Read more
posts.desc: Business accountants are employed by firms with secure data processes, who have your best interests in mind.
posts.html:
When your business requires an accountant but cannot hire one full-time, your next best option is to hire an outsourced business accountant for your small business. They are employed by firms with secure data processes, who have your best interests in mind. They work alongside teams of accountants that are adept at providing you with accounting services. 

Expectations of Business Accountants

The expectations one may have of business accountants in South Africa range from having experience with the latest software to expecting their financial reports on time. While not all firms offer the same services, they do meet certain pre-requisite needs.

Secure data processes

All firms take responsibility for securely handling your private data. This involves curated processes that improve with every financial year. Besides having safe cloud computing measures in place they keep their systems up-to-date whenever necessary. Your financial records can be trusted in their hands.

Recruiting Reliable Accountants

The quality of professional business accountants at your service at such costs is the biggest benefit you receive. Instead of hiring and paying top dollar for crème de la crème accountants, you receive their accounting expertise when outsourcing to business accounting firms at a fraction of the price.

Predicting and advising  

More recent accounting software has streamlined the tiresome process of inputting and analysing the data. The professional accounting minds that draw further upon the analysis give you more benefit than if you had attempted it yourself.

Who do they recruit?

The choice of recruits that firms hire meets specified requirements. Besides having financial mathematics and an analytical background backed by proficient computer skills, they have years of experience and business knowledge. All this is acquired from working with and alongside multiple companies.

Here are a few business accountants that outsourced firms hire:

Enrolled Agent (EA)

They are the big bosses in accounting. Generally found in leadership roles, they specialize in taxation and have a high standing with national revenue services. Firms hire enrolled agents to prepare and verify tax documents because of their representation rights. 

To become an enrolled agent they have to pass a three-part examination and undergo regular training and rigorous background checks. They are more than well-versed in the services that outsourced accounting firms provide.

Chartered Accountants (CA)

In certain countries like America, they are known as certified public accountants or CPAs. Unlike EAs, they have more expertise in accounting principles. Chartered accountants can make up the majority of accountants in a firm with their extensive financial knowledge.

Bookkeeper

While not all bookkeepers may be accountants, they are yet knowledgeable in the ways of finance. They can manage your payments and books but are not authorised in the space of taxation. Although business accounting firms can get an accountant to prepare the books, having a full-time bookkeeper frees up time for accountants to perform the more demanding tasks.

Services

Business accountants have prior knowledge, either through work experience or long-term standing with accounting firms. Here are some services your accountant can handle through the accounting firm.  

Bookkeeping

Primarily the job of a bookkeeper, you have an accurate record of your income and expenses. They take on the day-to-day financial transactions in the respective ledgers and complete the posting process thus making sure your books balance.

Payroll Services

A good outsourced accounting firm also includes payroll services. They manage your employees’ account set-up, their hours worked in-office, payment of salaries and managing deductions including tax responsibilities.  

Consulting

Quite often when it comes to tax, having the right guide can relieve all the stress. Your personal accountant is privy to the latest financial advice, backed by the firms’ analysis. 

As mentioned earlier your business accountant advisor will keep you up to date with tax laws. They can also offer guidance on how to structure your business’s financial processes. 

Tracking Financial Statements

The biggest part of having sound advice comes from the analysis of accurate finances. Knowing whether your accounts receivable are outstanding or if your debts are paid is a time-consuming task. When your finances are organized you gain the right metrics to determine where to allocate cash flow and make better financial decisions. 

Following up on due payments in a professional manner is one of the attributes of an accountant. Chances are your business may become more profitable. 

Independent Reviews

If you want to make sure that no financial errors have occurred with your financial statements, a business accountant will be able to review the same and provide limited assurance.

Conclusion

Small business accountants help you manage your financial and accounting needs. They are equipped to deliver upon the services offered by firms, and proactively contribute to your business. Whether it means you need advice on business structuring or only bookkeeping services, there is always an accountant for you.

af.title: Wat is 'n klein besigheid-rekenmeester?
af.desc: Besigheidsrekenmeesters word in diens geneem deur firmas met veilige dataprosesse, wat jou beste belange in gedagte het.
af.html:
Wanneer jou besigheid 'n rekenmeester benodig maar nie een voltyds kan aanstel nie, is jou volgende beste opsie om 'n uitgekontrakteerde besigheidsrekenmeester vir jou klein onderneming aan te stel. Hulle word in diens geneem deur firmas met veilige dataprosesse, wat jou beste belange in gedagte het. Hulle werk saam met spanne van rekenmeesters wat bedrewe is om jou van rekeningkundige dienste te voorsien.

Verwagtinge van besigheidsrekenmeesters

Die verwagtinge wat 'n mens van besigheidsrekenmeesters in Suid-Afrika mag hê, wissel van die ervaring met die nuutste sagteware tot die verwagting dat hul finansiële verslae betyds is. Hoewel nie alle firmas dieselfde dienste bied nie, voldoen hulle wel aan sekere voorvereistebehoeftes.

Veilige dataprosesse

Alle firmas neem verantwoordelikheid vir die veilige hantering van jou private data. Dit behels saamgestelde prosesse wat met elke finansiële jaar verbeter. Benewens veilige wolkrekenaarmaatreëls wat in plek is, hou hulle hul stelsels op datum wanneer ook al nodig. Jou finansiële rekords kan in hul hande vertrou word.

Werwing van betroubare rekenmeesters

Die gehalte van professionele besigheidsrekenmeesters tot jou diens teen sulke koste is die grootste voordeel wat jy ontvang. In plaas daarvan om die heel beste rekenmeesters aan te stel en topbedrae te betaal, ontvang jy hul rekeningkundige kundigheid wanneer jy aan besigheidsrekeningkundige firmas uitkontrakteer teen 'n fraksie van die prys.

Voorspel en adviseer

Meer onlangse rekeningkundige sagteware het die vermoeiende proses van die invoer en ontleding van data vergemaklik. Die professionele rekeningkundige verstande wat verder op die analise voortbou, gee jou meer voordeel as wat dit sou wees as jy dit self probeer het.

Wie werf hulle?

Die keuse van werwers wat firmas aanstel, voldoen aan gespesifiseerde vereistes. Benewens finansiële wiskunde en 'n analitiese agtergrond gerugsteun deur vaardige rekenaarvaardighede, het hulle jare se ervaring en besigheidskennis. Dit alles word verkry deur saam met en langs verskeie maatskappye te werk.

Hier is 'n paar besigheidsrekenmeesters wat uitgekontrakteerde firmas aanstel:

Geregistreerde agent (EA)

Hulle is die groot base in rekeningkunde. Gewoonlik gevind in leiersrolle, spesialiseer hulle in belasting en het 'n hoë aansien by nasionale inkomstedienste. Firmas stel geregistreerde agente aan om belastingdokumente voor te berei en te verifieer weens hul verteenwoordigingsregte.

Om 'n geregistreerde agent te word, moet hulle 'n driedelige eksamen slaag en gereelde opleiding en streng agtergrondkontroles ondergaan. Hulle is meer as goed bedrewe in die dienste wat uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkundige firmas verskaf.

Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters (CA)

In sekere lande soos Amerika staan hulle bekend as gesertifiseerde openbare rekenmeesters of CPA's. Anders as EA's het hulle meer kundigheid in rekeningkundige beginsels. Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters kan met hul uitgebreide finansiële kennis die meerderheid van rekenmeesters in 'n firma uitmaak.

Boekhouer

Hoewel nie alle boekhouers rekenmeesters mag wees nie, is hulle tog kundig in die weë van finansies. Hulle kan jou betalings en boeke bestuur, maar is nie gemagtig in die ruimte van belasting nie. Hoewel besigheidsrekeningkundige firmas 'n rekenmeester kan kry om die boeke voor te berei, maak die hê van 'n voltydse boekhouer tyd vry vir rekenmeesters om die meer veeleisende take te verrig.

Dienste

Besigheidsrekenmeesters het voorafkennis, hetsy deur werkservaring of langtermynverbintenis met rekeningkundige firmas. Hier is 'n paar dienste wat jou rekenmeester deur die rekeningkundige firma kan hanteer.  

Boekhouding

Primêr die werk van 'n boekhouer, het jy 'n akkurate rekord van jou inkomste en uitgawes. Hulle neem die dag-tot-dag finansiële transaksies in die onderskeie grootboeke aan en voltooi die boekingsproses sodat jou boeke balanseer.

Betaalstaatdienste

'n Goeie uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkundige firma sluit ook betaalstaatdienste in. Hulle bestuur jou werknemers se rekeningopstelling, hul ure wat in die kantoor gewerk is, betaling van salarisse en die bestuur van aftrekkings, insluitend belastingverantwoordelikhede.  

Konsultasie

Heel dikwels, wanneer dit by belasting kom, kan die regte gids al die stres verlig. Jou persoonlike rekenmeester is bewus van die nuutste finansiële advies, gerugsteun deur die firmas se analise. 

Soos vroeër genoem, sal jou besigheidsrekenmeester-adviseur jou op datum hou met belastingwette. Hulle kan ook leiding bied oor hoe om jou besigheid se finansiële prosesse te struktureer. 

Naspoor van finansiële state

Die grootste deel van soliede advies kom uit die analise van akkurate finansies. Om te weet of jou debiteure uitstaande is of of jou skulde betaal is, is 'n tydrowende taak. Wanneer jou finansies georganiseer is, kry jy die regte maatstawwe om te bepaal waar jy kontantvloei moet toewys en beter finansiële besluite te neem. 

Om op 'n professionele wyse op verskuldigde betalings op te volg, is een van die eienskappe van 'n rekenmeester. Die kanse is dat jou besigheid winsgewender kan word. 

Onafhanklike resensies

As jy seker wil maak dat geen finansiële foute met jou finansiële state voorgekom het nie, sal 'n besigheidsrekenmeester in staat wees om dit te resenseer en beperkte versekering te verskaf.

Gevolgtrekking

Klein besigheid-rekenmeesters help jou om jou finansiële en rekeningkundige behoeftes te bestuur. Hulle is toegerus om die dienste wat firmas bied te lewer, en dra proaktief tot jou besigheid by. Of dit beteken jy het advies oor besigheidstrukturering of slegs boekhoudingsdienste nodig, daar is altyd 'n rekenmeester vir jou.

posts.title: Accounting for entrepreneurs: 5 benefits of hiring an accounting firm for your business
posts.excerpt: There are a number of benefits of outsourcing accounting for entrepreneurs. You will save on unnecessary costs while having more time to focus on implementing strategies that help you achieve business goals. Your accounting records are handled by experts who maintain transparency with you. While also protecting your data, they help you avoid risky decisions and maintain your competitiveness.
posts.desc: Learn more about the benefits of outsourcing accounting for entrepreneurs running their small or medium businesses in South Africa
posts.html:
There are a number of benefits of outsourcing accounting for entrepreneurs. You will save on unnecessary costs while having more time to focus on implementing strategies that help you achieve business goals. Your accounting records are handled by experts who maintain transparency with you. While also protecting your data, they help you avoid risky decisions and maintain your competitiveness.

Save money on costs

There are many ways in which outsourcing accounting for entrepreneurs can save on costs. The two primary means are the process of checks done by the chartered accountants through all stages, thus decreasing any chance of discrepancies and future penalisation. The second benefit is having fewer salaries on your payroll.

The average price you would pay for accounting services is globally cheaper than in-house departments, let alone the quality of service. Besides operating at a competitive cost range, a monetary benefit, you gain many services with knowledgeable expertise in accounting functions.

Part of the job of a chartered accountant is to help entrepreneurs establish a cash flow. Liquidity in business is king and allows businesses agility and adaptability when it comes to making costly decisions.

Focus on core business

While you continue your daily business, your outsourced accounting firm provides you with the necessary accounting functions. Backed with up-to-date software providing accurate financial reporting, you’re likely to increase profit margins and even award more bonuses to your existing employees.

Financial accounting for entrepreneurs is handled externally by professionals. Employee retention is positively affected. The elimination of micro-managing means a better relationship with employees. If you want your business to succeed in the long term, having a unified department is what makes the difference.

Having more human resources allows the right minds to work on each process which increases efficiency. You’re able to work more closely with teams which are focused on achieving non-financial goals. Your ideal standard for your business is thus more achievable. The time and energy would otherwise be split.

Chartered accountants have the expertise to oversee business operations. In the instance that you take leave, accountants can step in as acting managers. The job of accounting for entrepreneurs is made easier with extra services.

Additionally, they are able to handle the entire taxation process. Such a big task may be handled incorrectly without professional backing. If you find yourself doubting the process, you can always ask your accountants for reports on a consistent basis.

A trustworthy reputation that protects against fraud

Hiring an external chartered accountant adds an extra layer of reliability. Your auditing is done externally and companies or investors can trust that you’re free from instances of internal fraud. Such wouldn’t be the case if you had an in-house department.

The measures that your outsourced accounting firm will take ensure that such assumptions can be held. While saving costs, outsourcing accounting for entrepreneurship purposes gives you a good standing with bankers. All accounting firms hire chartered accountants who understand the business. They have the know-how when it comes to balancing the sheets and increasing profits.

Maintain financial edge

As mentioned earlier, you get peace of mind when you’re outsourcing your accounting knowing you have more time to focus on what drives you ahead in business. Chartered accountants also give advice concerning business planning and structuring. They have years of solutions to many business problems. Such insight puts you a step ahead of all competitors.

Top-down organization of your books brings about ease of mind when it comes to reporting. With the right team of accountants managing your books externally you know your business is within due regulation at all times.

Less risk

Outsourced firms that provide accounting for entrepreneurs understand that they hope to mitigate the risks involved. Their entire firm’s processes are designed to eliminate said risks. Having their reports checked by more senior chartered accountants is one of the measures taken by accounting firms.

Inconsistencies, while they are inevitable, can be quickly ironed out. Alongside the internal goals, accounting firms provide you with insight into where to spend your cash float. Deciding to alleviate yourself of debt or expand on the business could be the make or break factor. Without a proficient leader in the decision-making process, you could set your business goals back a few years.

Conclusion

In summary, you can rely on your professional financial advisor to decrease costs throughout your business. They create solid plans that bring liquidity to the business.

The time you save when you outsource your accounting is invaluable. Your growth factor increases exponentially when you focus on the crucial aspects.

Investors and bankers can rely on fewer discrepancies, boosting your likelihood of loans and investments. You mitigate risks when outsourcing your accounting.

You get an edge over your competitors by benefiting from the latest software and advice. The team of expert chartered accountants provide uncanny solutions from years of experience.

af.title: Rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurs: 5 voordele van die aanstel van 'n rekeningkundige firma vir jou besigheid
af.desc: Leer meer oor die voordele van uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurs wat hul klein of medium besighede in Suid-Afrika bestuur.
af.html:
Daar is 'n aantal voordele van uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurs. Jy sal op onnodige koste bespaar terwyl jy meer tyd het om te fokus op die implementering van strategieë wat jou help om besigheidsdoelwitte te bereik. Jou rekeningkundige rekords word deur kundiges hanteer wat deursigtigheid met jou handhaaf. Terwyl hulle ook jou data beskerm, help hulle jou om riskante besluite te vermy en jou mededingendheid te handhaaf.

Bespaar geld op koste

Daar is baie maniere waarop uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurs op koste kan bespaar. Die twee primêre maniere is die proses van kontroles wat deur die geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters deur alle stadiums gedoen word, sodat enige kans op teenstrydighede en toekomstige bestrawwing verminder word. Die tweede voordeel is om minder salarisse op jou betaalstaat te hê.

Die gemiddelde prys wat jy vir rekeningkundige dienste sou betaal, is wêreldwyd goedkoper as interne departemente, wat nog te sê van die gehalte van diens. Benewens die bedryf teen 'n mededingende kosteband, 'n monetêre voordeel, kry jy baie dienste met kundige bekwaamheid in rekeningkundige funksies.

Deel van die werk van 'n geoktrooieerde rekenmeester is om entrepreneurs te help om 'n kontantvloei te vestig. Likiditeit in besigheid is koning en stel besighede in staat tot ratsheid en aanpasbaarheid wanneer dit by die neem van duur besluite kom.

Fokus op kernbesigheid

Terwyl jy jou daaglikse besigheid voortsit, voorsien jou uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkundige firma jou van die nodige rekeningkundige funksies. Gerugsteun deur sagteware wat op datum is en akkurate finansiële verslagdoening verskaf, is jy waarskynlik om winsmarges te verhoog en selfs meer bonusse aan jou bestaande werknemers toe te ken.

Finansiële rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurs word ekstern deur professionele persone hanteer. Werknemerbehoud word positief beïnvloed. Die uitskakeling van mikrobestuur beteken 'n beter verhouding met werknemers. As jy wil hê jou besigheid moet op die lange duur slaag, is 'n verenigde departement wat die verskil maak.

Om meer menslike hulpbronne te hê, laat die regte verstande aan elke proses werk, wat doeltreffendheid verhoog. Jy kan nouer saamwerk met spanne wat gefokus is op die bereiking van nie-finansiële doelwitte. Jou ideale standaard vir jou besigheid is dus meer bereikbaar. Die tyd en energie sou andersins verdeel word.

Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters het die kundigheid om besigheidsbedrywighede toe te sien. In die geval dat jy verlof neem, kan rekenmeesters as waarnemende bestuurders instaan. Die werk van rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurs word makliker gemaak met ekstra dienste.

Daarbenewens is hulle in staat om die hele belastingproses te hanteer. So 'n groot taak kan verkeerd hanteer word sonder professionele rugsteun. As jy jouself bevind dat jy die proses bevraagteken, kan jy altyd jou rekenmeesters op 'n konsekwente basis vir verslae vra.

'n Betroubare reputasie wat teen bedrog beskerm

Om 'n eksterne geoktrooieerde rekenmeester aan te stel, voeg 'n ekstra laag van betroubaarheid by. Jou ouditering word ekstern gedoen en maatskappye of beleggers kan vertrou dat jy vry is van gevalle van interne bedrog. Dit sou nie die geval wees as jy 'n interne departement gehad het nie.

Die maatreëls wat jou uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkundige firma sal tref, verseker dat sulke aannames gehandhaaf kan word. Terwyl dit koste bespaar, gee uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurskapsdoeleindes jou 'n goeie aansien by bankiers. Alle rekeningkundige firmas stel geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters aan wat die besigheid verstaan. Hulle het die kennis wanneer dit kom by die balansering van die state en die verhoging van winste.

Handhaaf finansiële voorsprong

Soos vroeër genoem, kry jy gemoedsrus wanneer jy jou rekeningkunde uitkontrakteer, wetende dat jy meer tyd het om te fokus op wat jou vorentoe dryf in besigheid. Geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters gee ook advies rakende besigheidsbeplanning en -strukturering. Hulle het jare se oplossings vir baie besigheidsprobleme. Sulke insig plaas jou 'n tree voor alle mededingers.

Bo-na-onder organisasie van jou boeke bring gemoedsrus wanneer dit by verslagdoening kom. Met die regte span rekenmeesters wat jou boeke ekstern bestuur, weet jy jou besigheid is te alle tye binne behoorlike regulasie.

Minder risiko

Uitgekontrakteerde firmas wat rekeningkunde vir entrepreneurs verskaf, verstaan dat hulle hoop om die betrokke risiko's te verminder. Hul hele firma se prosesse is ontwerp om genoemde risiko's uit te skakel. Om hul verslae deur meer senior geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters te laat kontroleer is een van die maatreëls wat deur rekeningkundige firmas getref word.

Teenstrydighede, hoewel hulle onvermydelik is, kan vinnig reggestryk word. Saam met die interne doelwitte voorsien rekeningkundige firmas jou van insig oor waar om jou kontantvlot te bestee. Om te besluit om jouself van skuld te verlig of die besigheid uit te brei, kan die maak-of-breek faktor wees. Sonder 'n bekwame leier in die besluitnemingsproses, kan jy jou besigheidsdoelwitte 'n paar jaar terugsit.

Gevolgtrekking

Ter opsomming, jy kan op jou professionele finansiële adviseur staatmaak om koste regdeur jou besigheid te verminder. Hulle skep soliede planne wat likiditeit na die besigheid bring.

Die tyd wat jy bespaar wanneer jy jou rekeningkunde uitkontrakteer, is van onskatbare waarde. Jou groeifaktor neem eksponensieel toe wanneer jy op die kritieke aspekte fokus.

Beleggers en bankiers kan op minder teenstrydighede staatmaak, wat jou waarskynlikheid van lenings en beleggings verhoog. Jy verminder risiko's wanneer jy jou rekeningkunde uitkontrakteer.

Jy kry 'n voorsprong oor jou mededingers deur voordeel te trek uit die nuutste sagteware en advies. Die span van kundige geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters verskaf buitengewone oplossings uit jare se ervaring.

posts.title: Five key benefits of bookkeeping for businesses
posts.excerpt: Whether you’re the owner of a small e-commerce business, jewellery store or home start-up, SARS expects all bookkeeping for businesses to be in order. Having your financial statements ready when the occasion arises keeps you stress-free.
posts.desc: Besides being a requirement by law, bookkeeping for businesses gives you peace of mind when it comes to decision-making.
posts.html:
Besides being a requirement by law, bookkeeping for businesses gives you peace of mind when it comes to decision-making. Here are the five benefits of bookkeeping:

  • Helps you comply with government laws
  • Allows certainty while budgeting
  • Keeps finance organized and easier to analyse
  • Effortless reporting
  • Prepared for audits and tax season

Helps you comply with government laws.

Whether you’re the owner of a small e-commerce business, jewellery store or home start-up, SARS expects all bookkeeping for businesses to be in order. Having your financial statements ready when the occasion arises keeps you stress-free.

The government also expects all businesses to toe the line when new regulations are enforced. Such is the case with taxation transitioning to digital. Accounting services do bookkeeping for businesses and always keep up to date with the latest cloud software, regardless of new digital implementations.

This allows you to adapt as a small business, maintaining your competitiveness amongst companies. You don’t have to worry about compliance when your accounting services take on the responsibility.

Allows certainty while budgeting.

Knowing when and where to spend on core business applications means earlier and more consistent growth. You get better predictions on your tax, which enables you to set aside accurate funds.

The decisions align with your bookkeeping and accounting, enabling more precision with financial results. Expenses don’t come as a surprise and you always have the knowledge that you’re profiting come hell or high water. Such is the advantage of accurate bookkeeping for businesses.

You eliminate losses, or better yet, are able to plan ahead and avoid them at all costs. This point is elaborated on further when we mention how graphing and visualizing your financial data contributes to achieving your goals.

Keeps finances organized and easier to analyse.

When your finances are organized, you can track and cut back on unnecessary expenses. Knowing accounts receivable and trends in late payments help to improve cash flow. 

It also allows for insightful strategies to be implemented which enable you to plan for dips in cash liquidity. Your business roadmap allows you to achieve your yearly financial goals when you take out all the guesswork.

Bookkeeping for businesses keeps you protected against and simultaneously helps you avoid instances of fraud. When your firm’s accounts are in order and you have time to focus on the core aspects of your business, you eliminate stress and learn faster.

When your financial data is organized, if you get it clearly visualized, you are able to make more intuitive decisions based on a thorough understanding of key factors that are accurate due to your financial records. Along with the visualization factor, you’re able to pick up on questions that may have not crossed your mind in the first place. If your data had been off, your questions would later lead to inaccurate results which would cost the company and derail you from your goals.

The best accounting firms practice such organization and make use of opportunities, whereas inexperienced companies fail due to gaps in their bookkeeping.

Effortless reporting.

Your books will always be available when an investor needs a report. Delivering it timely will add to the confidence they have in your business.

You turn roadblocks into opportunities when demands for cloud accounting give you the prospect to reach overseas investors. This simultaneously prompts investors to do financial analysis with regard to Porter’s five forces, expecting accurate bookkeeping for businesses regardless of size.

And while you may have clear goals, their findings may contribute to your business and open up new prospects to expand.

Besides external investors, you can confidently approach banks for loans. If you’ve used the financial data to make use of opportunities, bankers will be more interested in your proposals. All this is on top of the feedback that spot-on bookkeeping for business enables.

Prepared for audits and tax season.

Dread it, run from it, tax season arrives all the same. If your balance sheet is out of date, then you add to the stress when it comes to filing your taxes at the end of the tax year.

Tax accountants have an easier job when your books are up to date. You’re less likely to get penalised if they require little time to review your accounts.

External auditors may even be impressed, which contributes to a good word about your small business. Imagine the unprompted marketing opportunities you gain when an accountant mentions your business around a dinner table.

Takeaways

Outsourcing your accounting to firms that do bookkeeping for businesses, keeps you from discrepancies and thus keeps your business in line with regulations. Your key benefits are accuracy within budgeting, easier analyses of financial goals and increased likelihood of securing investors.

Whilst every other company may stress about tax season, you will happily continue with your day-to-day tasks.

af.title: Vyf sleutelvoordele van boekhouding vir besighede
af.desc: Benewens 'n vereiste deur die wet, gee boekhouding vir besighede jou gemoedsrus wanneer dit by besluitneming kom.
af.html:
Benewens 'n vereiste deur die wet, gee boekhouding vir besighede jou gemoedsrus wanneer dit by besluitneming kom. Hier is die vyf voordele van boekhouding:

  • Help jou om aan staatswette te voldoen
  • Bied sekerheid tydens begroting
  • Hou finansies georganiseer en makliker om te ontleed
  • Moeitelose verslagdoening
  • Voorbereid vir oudits en belastingseisoen

Help jou om aan staatswette te voldoen.

Of jy nou die eienaar van 'n klein e-handelsbesigheid, juwelierswinkel of tuisonderneming is, SARS verwag dat alle boekhouding vir besighede in orde moet wees. Om jou finansiële state gereed te hê wanneer die geleentheid opduik, hou jou stresvry.

Die staat verwag ook dat alle besighede in die ry val wanneer nuwe regulasies afgedwing word. Dit is die geval met belasting wat na digitaal oorskakel. Rekeningkundige dienste doen boekhouding vir besighede en bly altyd op datum met die nuutste wolksagteware, ongeag nuwe digitale implementerings.

Dit stel jou in staat om as 'n klein besigheid aan te pas en jou mededingendheid onder maatskappye te handhaaf. Jy hoef nie oor voldoening bekommerd te wees wanneer jou rekeningkundige dienste die verantwoordelikheid op hulle neem nie.

Bied sekerheid tydens begroting.

Om te weet wanneer en waar om op kernbesigheidstoepassings te bestee, beteken vroeër en meer konsekwente groei. Jy kry beter voorspellings oor jou belasting, wat jou in staat stel om akkurate fondse opsy te sit.

Die besluite stem ooreen met jou boekhouding en rekeningkunde, wat meer presisie met finansiële resultate moontlik maak. Uitgawes kom nie as 'n verrassing nie en jy het altyd die kennis dat jy wins maak, kom hel of hoë water. Dit is die voordeel van akkurate boekhouding vir besighede.

Jy skakel verliese uit, of beter nog, kan vooruit beplan en hulle teen alle koste vermy. Hierdie punt word verder uitgebrei wanneer ons noem hoe die grafiekvoorstelling en visualisering van jou finansiële data bydra tot die bereiking van jou doelwitte.

Hou finansies georganiseer en makliker om te ontleed.

Wanneer jou finansies georganiseer is, kan jy onnodige uitgawes naspoor en besnoei. Om debiteure en tendense in laat betalings te ken, help om kontantvloei te verbeter. 

Dit maak ook insiggewende strategieë moontlik wat geïmplementeer kan word om jou in staat te stel om vir insinkings in kontantlikiditeit te beplan. Jou besigheidsplan stel jou in staat om jou jaarlikse finansiële doelwitte te bereik wanneer jy alle raaiwerk uitskakel.

Boekhouding vir besighede hou jou beskerm teen, en help jou terselfdertyd om, gevalle van bedrog te vermy. Wanneer jou firma se rekeninge in orde is en jy tyd het om op die kernaspekte van jou besigheid te fokus, skakel jy stres uit en leer vinniger.

Wanneer jou finansiële data georganiseer is, en jy dit duidelik gevisualiseer kry, is jy in staat om meer intuïtiewe besluite te neem gebaseer op 'n deeglike begrip van sleutelfaktore wat akkuraat is weens jou finansiële rekords. Saam met die visualiseringsfaktor is jy in staat om vrae op te tel wat dalk nie in die eerste plek by jou opgekom het nie. As jou data verkeerd was, sou jou vrae later tot onakkurate resultate lei wat die maatskappy sou kos en jou van jou doelwitte sou aflei.

Die beste rekeningkundige firmas beoefen sulke organisasie en maak gebruik van geleenthede, terwyl onervare maatskappye misluk weens gapings in hul boekhouding.

Moeitelose verslagdoening.

Jou boeke sal altyd beskikbaar wees wanneer 'n belegger 'n verslag nodig het. Om dit betyds te lewer, sal bydra tot die vertroue wat hulle in jou besigheid het.

Jy verander padversperrings in geleenthede wanneer die aanvraag na wolkrekeningkunde jou die vooruitsig gee om oorsese beleggers te bereik. Dit spoor terselfdertyd beleggers aan om finansiële analise te doen met betrekking tot Porter se vyf kragte, en hulle verwag akkurate boekhouding vir besighede ongeag grootte.

En terwyl jy dalk duidelike doelwitte het, kan hul bevindinge tot jou besigheid bydra en nuwe vooruitsigte open om uit te brei.

Benewens eksterne beleggers, kan jy met selfvertroue banke vir lenings nader. As jy die finansiële data gebruik het om gebruik te maak van geleenthede, sal bankiers meer belangstel in jou voorstelle. Dit alles is bo-op die terugvoer wat akkurate boekhouding vir besighede moontlik maak.

Voorbereid vir oudits en belastingseisoen.

Vrees dit, vlug daarvan, belastingseisoen kom nietemin. As jou balansstaat verouderd is, dan voeg jy tot die stres by wanneer dit kom by die indiening van jou belasting aan die einde van die belastingjaar.

Belastingrekenmeesters het 'n makliker werk wanneer jou boeke op datum is. Jy is minder geneig om gepenaliseer te word as hulle min tyd nodig het om jou rekeninge te hersien.

Eksterne ouditeure mag selfs beïndruk wees, wat bydra tot 'n goeie woord oor jou klein besigheid. Stel jou die ongevraagde bemarkingsgeleenthede voor wat jy kry wanneer 'n rekenmeester jou besigheid rondom 'n etenstafel noem.

Wegneemboodskappe

Om jou rekeningkunde uit te kontrakteer aan firmas wat boekhouding vir besighede doen, hou jou weg van teenstrydighede en hou jou besigheid sodoende in lyn met regulasies. Jou sleutelvoordele is akkuraatheid binne begroting, makliker analises van finansiële doelwitte en verhoogde waarskynlikheid om beleggers te verseker.

Terwyl elke ander maatskappy dalk oor belastingseisoen stres, sal jy gelukkig voortgaan met jou dag-tot-dag take.

posts.title: Finding the right accountant for your small business in South Africa
posts.excerpt: Going about finding the right accountant to outsource your accounting to is a similar process to hiring an employee. You need to know their level of qualification and find out if they’re the right fit.
posts.desc: Here's what you need to know before you choose an accountant or an accountoing firm to take care of your business's accounting
posts.html:
Going about finding the right accountant to outsource your accounting to is a similar process to hiring an employee.

You need to know their level of qualification and find out if they’re the right fit.

To know that, you need to assess your accounting needs and examine the services they offer, and how often you would expect an accounting review. Once this is taken care of, the rest is up to them.

Firstly, ask yourself: Do I need an accountant?

It’s pointless to go about looking for an outsourced accountant if you have no work for them.

In some cases, you might be in need, but your budget doesn’t allow room for outsourcing. If so, search with the intention to hire an accountant at a later stage.

Assess your accounting needs.

If you require both auditing and a review, you might need to hire a different accountant.

According to Taylor & Francis, most small enterprises in South Africa don’t engage in financial planning or lack certain books. It’s important to note that you may have the best business idea, but if your business has a financial hole, you could sink into debt.

What tools have you come across that may save you time in the department? Are you looking to upgrade to new software? An outsourced accounting firm most likely has expertise on board already. 

What financial model are you using, and what are the pitfalls? How do you share information between departments? Accounting firms have exposure to many models and can recommend ingenious improvements, no matter how minor. Reporting is a given when outsourcing your accounting services, but the question may be asked when interviewing: How often should it be done?

Do you have the right books and does the variety suffice for all financial needs? You can speak to your accountant on customizing their services to your needs. In these ways, it’s important to first check your existing processes before deciding to hire an outsourced accountant.

What services are offered, and at what price?

Comprehensive coverage of accounting services are a must when choosing your financial partner. It provides a guarantee that your dedicated chartered accountant will be qualified to handle all financial challenges that your business encounters.

Services that a good firm would offer may include the following:

  • Bookkeeping services
  • Taxation and auditing services
  • Independent reviews
  • Payroll services

On top of that, you should have a dedicated team and an individual chartered accountant that reports directly to you and offers advice. They should have an understanding of your business and financial goals which should be reviewed regularly while offering a financial analytics report.

Most companies have pricing brackets on certain service brackets, which many may tailor to suit the size of a business. Prices vary, and initially one would expect to go with the cheapest offer. But as anyone with a good head fixed on their shoulders should know: don’t judge a bookkeeper by the price on their web page. Schedule a meeting to properly understand how their services could benefit you and what you’re getting for the cost.

Are they the right accountant for you?

Are they qualified? Are they available? Should I have hired an employee instead? You may feel anxious about making the wrong decision. Be patient with the process, be clear on your financial needs, and all the worry will transform into clarity. 

Outsourced companies have a range of services, and their chartered accountants are more than capable of delivering on the results.

Over and above the services that the outsourced accounting firm offers, you could expect a bit more from your chartered accountant. Like for hiring an employee, you would need to do background checks. This can be made easier with the help of companies that specialise in these areas, or a reliable HR manager. 

Having your questions prepared before the interview and asking questions based on your needs will help you gauge their competence. Knowing that firms take the time to hire qualified accountants, be subtle when asking about their qualifications. 

Find out what solutions they would suggest to an accounting problem you may have encountered. This approach is beneficial to both parties as you can assess their advice from the get-go while they get insight into your expectations and business.

Be sure to find out about their availability and dedication to your business. If they don’t show an interest or ask questions, they will probably treat you as simply another client and may not be prepared to go the extra mile. 

All things considered, if this does not align with company values, consider your second option. A clear red flag that you’ve hired the wrong accountant is if you only hear from them when it’s tax season.

Summary

Once you’ve learnt what your needs are and have assessed the criteria of your ideal chartered accountant, you could proceed in selecting prospective accountants.

For revenue enhancement, select firms with diverse services. Before approaching, know what queries you may inevitably need to be advised on. Committed accounts with accessibility will provide value. Be sure to have this in your criteria when selecting a bookkeeper.

af.title: Hoe om die regte rekenmeester vir jou klein besigheid in Suid-Afrika te vind
af.desc: Hier is wat jy moet weet voordat jy ’n rekenmeester of rekeningkundige firma kies om jou besigheid se rekeningkunde te hanteer.
af.html:
Om die regte rekenmeester te vind aan wie jy jou rekeningkunde kan uitkontrakteer, is ’n soortgelyke proses as om ’n werknemer aan te stel.

Jy moet hul vlak van kwalifikasie ken en uitvind of hulle die regte passing is.

Om dit te weet, moet jy jou rekeningkundige behoeftes assesseer en die dienste wat hulle bied ondersoek, asook hoe dikwels jy ’n rekeningkundige hersiening sou verwag. Sodra dit afgehandel is, is die res aan hulle oorgelaat.

Vra eerstens vir jouself: Het ek ’n rekenmeester nodig?

Dit is doelloos om na ’n uitgekontrakteerde rekenmeester te soek as jy geen werk vir hulle het nie.

In sommige gevalle mag jy in nood wees, maar jou begroting laat nie ruimte vir uitkontraktering toe nie. Indien wel, soek met die voorneme om ’n rekenmeester op ’n latere stadium aan te stel.

Assesseer jou rekeningkundige behoeftes.

As jy beide ouditering en ’n hersiening benodig, mag jy ’n ander rekenmeester moet aanstel.

Volgens Taylor & Francis neem die meeste klein ondernemings in Suid-Afrika nie aan finansiële beplanning deel nie of kort sekere boeke. Dit is belangrik om daarop te let dat jy die beste besigheidsidee mag hê, maar as jou besigheid ’n finansiële gat het, kan jy in skuld wegsink.

Watter hulpmiddels het jy teëgekom wat jou tyd in die afdeling mag bespaar? Wil jy na nuwe sagteware opgradeer? ’n Uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkundige firma het heel waarskynlik reeds kundigheid aan boord. 

Watter finansiële model gebruik jy, en wat is die slaggate? Hoe deel jy inligting tussen afdelings? Rekeningkundige firmas het blootstelling aan baie modelle en kan vernuftige verbeterings aanbeveel, hoe gering ook al. Verslagdoening is ’n gegewe wanneer jy jou rekeningkundige dienste uitkontrakteer, maar die vraag kan tydens die onderhoud gevra word: Hoe dikwels moet dit gedoen word?

Het jy die regte boeke en is die verskeidenheid voldoende vir alle finansiële behoeftes? Jy kan met jou rekenmeester praat oor die aanpassing van hul dienste by jou behoeftes. Op hierdie maniere is dit belangrik om eers jou bestaande prosesse na te gaan voordat jy besluit om ’n uitgekontrakteerde rekenmeester aan te stel.

Watter dienste word gebied, en teen watter prys?

Omvattende dekking van rekeningkundige dienste is ’n moet wanneer jy jou finansiële vennoot kies. Dit bied ’n waarborg dat jou toegewyde geoktrooieerde rekenmeester gekwalifiseer sal wees om alle finansiële uitdagings wat jou besigheid teëkom te hanteer.

Dienste wat ’n goeie firma sou bied, kan die volgende insluit:

  • Boekhoudingsdienste
  • Belasting- en ouditdienste
  • Onafhanklike hersienings
  • Salarisadministrasiedienste

Bo en behalwe dit, behoort jy ’n toegewyde span en ’n individuele geoktrooieerde rekenmeester te hê wat direk aan jou rapporteer en advies bied. Hulle behoort ’n begrip van jou besigheid en finansiële doelwitte te hê wat gereeld hersien moet word terwyl ’n finansiële ontledingsverslag gebied word.

Die meeste maatskappye het pryskategorieë op sekere dienskategorieë, wat baie mag aanpas om by die grootte van ’n besigheid te pas. Pryse wissel, en aanvanklik sou ’n mens verwag om met die goedkoopste aanbod te gaan. Maar soos enigiemand met ’n goeie kop op sy skouers behoort te weet: moenie ’n boekhouer aan die prys op hul webblad beoordeel nie. Skeduleer ’n vergadering om behoorlik te verstaan hoe hul dienste jou kan bevoordeel en wat jy vir die koste kry.

Is hulle die regte rekenmeester vir jou?

Is hulle gekwalifiseer? Is hulle beskikbaar? Moes ek eerder ’n werknemer aangestel het? Jy mag angstig voel oor die maak van die verkeerde besluit. Wees geduldig met die proses, wees duidelik oor jou finansiële behoeftes, en al die bekommernis sal in helderheid verander. 

Uitgekontrakteerde maatskappye het ’n reeks dienste, en hul geoktrooieerde rekenmeesters is meer as in staat om die resultate te lewer.

Bo en behalwe die dienste wat die uitgekontrakteerde rekeningkundige firma bied, kan jy ’n bietjie meer van jou geoktrooieerde rekenmeester verwag. Soos met die aanstelling van ’n werknemer, sou jy agtergrondkontroles moes doen. Dit kan makliker gemaak word met die hulp van maatskappye wat in hierdie areas spesialiseer, of ’n betroubare MH-bestuurder.

Om jou vrae voor die onderhoud gereed te hê en vrae te vra op grond van jou behoeftes, sal jou help om hul bevoegdheid te peil. Wetende dat firmas die tyd neem om gekwalifiseerde rekenmeesters aan te stel, wees subtiel wanneer jy oor hul kwalifikasies vra.

Vind uit watter oplossings hulle sou voorstel vir ’n rekeningkundige probleem wat jy dalk teëgekom het. Hierdie benadering is voordelig vir beide partye aangesien jy hul advies van die staanspoor af kan assesseer terwyl hulle insig in jou verwagtinge en besigheid kry.

Maak seker jy vind uit oor hul beskikbaarheid en toewyding aan jou besigheid. As hulle nie belangstelling toon of vrae vra nie, sal hulle jou waarskynlik bloot as nog ’n kliënt behandel en mag dalk nie bereid wees om die ekstra myl te loop nie. 

Alles in ag genome, as dit nie met maatskappywaardes ooreenstem nie, oorweeg jou tweede opsie. ’n Duidelike rooi vlag dat jy die verkeerde rekenmeester aangestel het, is as jy net van hulle hoor wanneer dit belastingseisoen is.

Opsomming

Sodra jy geleer het wat jou behoeftes is en die kriteria van jou ideale geoktrooieerde rekenmeester geassesseer het, kan jy voortgaan om voornemende rekenmeesters te kies.

Vir inkomsteverbetering, kies firmas met uiteenlopende dienste. Voordat jy hulle nader, weet watter navrae jy onvermydelik oor advies sal benodig. Toegewyde rekeninge met toeganklikheid sal waarde bied. Maak seker jy het dit in jou kriteria wanneer jy ’n boekhouer kies.

posts.title: Benefits of outsourcing accounting services for small businesses in South Africa.
posts.excerpt: One of the key benefits of outsourcing your accounting services is the ability to access an array of financial advice. The experience and expertise offered by professional accountants is invaluable.
posts.desc: Some benefits of accounting services for small businesses are access to expert financial advice, streamlined processes, and lower costs. Learn more here.
posts.html:
Outsourcing accounting services for small businesses in South Africa can have several benefits, including:

  • Access to the expertise of seasoned professionals
  • Avoiding the issues and expenses associated with hiring new workers
  • Saving time and resources that can be used to focus on core business activities
  • Improved quality of service within deadlines
  • Cost savings due to reduced overhead costs such as salaries, benefits, and office space

The debate of outsourcing accounting services versus growing in-house accounting departments shows up time and time again and for good reason. 

With many South Africans leaving their 9-5’s to start small businesses, the challenge to up-scale remains costly. 

Here are a few reasons why hiring an outsourced accounting firm can be more advantageous than hiring an in-house chartered accountant:

Professional accounting service from the get-go.

When making the decision of outsourcing accounting services, the primary benefit one receives will be the professional team of accounts immediately. 

You do not need to hire additional staff and build systems of records from the ground up. Outsourced chartered accountants use the latest accounting software and cloud services, to generate problem-solving ideas easily.

With strict processes and a desire to maintain a good reputation, all financial statements are checked thoroughly by senior accountants thus making discrepancies non-existent. 

Some of the services offered by outsourced accounts include book-keeping, billing, consulting and independent audits, taxation, payroll and auditing services.

Their expertise and connections also enable them to niche markets and skilled private individuals.

This adds to the quality output of reports and if their sources are offshore you gain an extra advantage without the hassle.

By maintaining a good repertoire you afford yourself the prospective to explore new markets.

No additional staff is required.

An enterprise’s finances are made simpler when outsourcing accounting services, but that is not the only advantage.

When up-scaling your business, the choice to have an in-house accounting department may seem the most natural, however, the process itself demands certain tasks to be carried out that take away from the essential functions which do grow the business. 

Outsourcing your accounting will guarantee that you will get expert chartered accountants, who have been trained and exposed to the latest technology and trends. 

Burnout rates amongst accounting departments, due to lack of stimulation and expecting the same work all year round, are common reasons businesses lack the motives to retain existing employees, such is not the case when outsourcing accounting services to dedicated firms. 

The burnout rate of chartered accountants is thus lower in outsourced accounting firms knowing that the firms hire adequate staff and avoid overworking their employees by distributing portfolios amongst the teams. 

Overall, with retainer fees being cheaper than chartered accounting department salaries, small businesses gain an edge with overall revenue increasing while maintaining a steady cash flow.

Reliable advice.

The decisions that come from outsourced accounting firms can offer insights from years of experience and records that no department or individual can match. 

Small enterprises benefit from decreasing costs and having less time to break-in to the market but most importantly, having accurate reporting and sound financial advice readily available. 

Outsourcing accounting services provide such expertise that leads to increased trust and demand, with the predicted overall worldwide business process outsourcing market to rise above US$ 343 billion before 2026 according to trends from The Source. 

Additionally, for financial consulting and further upgrades in service, these outsourced accountants or business accopuntants can be relied on all around the clock and more so for general customer service queries. 

One long-term benefit and a major difference is the fact that outsourcing your accounting needs means you need not worry about raises for an entire department. 

Reducing costs while maintaining quality.

Gaining more flexibility and time on more important tasks whilst saving costs, can be expected when outsourcing accounting services.

The review of your financial statements, which is done by senior chartered accountants, is set to your schedule whether it be monthly or on a quarterly basis.

On top of that, if the accounting firm provides taxation and payroll services then you have a firm that you can rely on for all your financial needs. 

Bookkeeping for small businesses by employees, no matter the prior enterprise finance experience of owners, needs to adhere to stipulated financial regulations. 

Without a knowledgeable lead, employees run the risk of breaking the legislation and tax compliances which add to a list of problems to be alleviated, and by outsourcing accounting services you can guarantee this task is never overlooked. 

Outsourced accounts, with their primary operation being lean accounting, have the technical know-how and are fully versed with the regulations and thus proactively avoid non-compliance penalties. 

You also have the ease of mind knowing that your time can be spent bringing in more customers while accounts receivable and financial statements can be expected on time.

Backed by initiatives and well motivated.
